name: shotpath
title: Shotpath
description: Upload the clipboard screenshot to an SSH host and copy the remote path
author: connorads

commands.name: copy-remote-shot-path
commands.title: Copy Remote Shot Path
commands.description: Pick an SSH host, upload the clipboard screenshot with shotpath, and copy the remote path

preferences.name: shotpathPath
preferences.title: shotpath Binary
preferences.description: Absolute path to the shotpath executable. Leave blank to use ~/.local/bin/shotpath.
